title: pterygiella cylindrica var. suffruticosa
intro: Pterygiella cylindrica var. suffruticosa, also known as a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Lamiaceae, is a woody-stemmed variant of the Pterygiella cylindrica species. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Pterygiella cylindrica var. suffruticosa include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to protect against oxidative stress, inflammation, and infections. Pterygiella cylindrica var. suffruticosa is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
